seo.title: Muhammed Alsayed - Full-Stack Web Developer
seo.description: Welcome to my portfolio! I'm Muhammed Alsayed, a full-stack web developer passionate about creating modern, user-friendly web experiences. Explore my work, experience, and journey in the world of web development.

title: Hey, I'm Muhammed 👋
description: I'm a Full-Stack Web Developer with a passion for creating beautiful and functional web applications. I enjoy learning new technologies, building things, and helping people.

about.title: About Me
about.description: As a full-stack developer, I'm driven to make a positive impact on the community, interested in programming, open to learning everything about technology, specifically web fields with solid knowledge in both front-end and back-end development, and a fast self-learner. I believe in knowledge transfer and can easily collaborate and share knowledge with my colleagues and learn from them.

items.description: Working on the "Libyana Hub" project, a digital platform by Libyana, Libya's leading mobile network operator.

Mataa app, is the largest shopping application in Libya, specializing in providing original products from renowned international brands. Their goal is to offer the best shopping experience to customers across all Libyan cities.
